title: Shallow Discovery Capture (wide coverage layer)
summary: Add additive shallow-capture normalization in high-volume discovery paths so accepted and rejected candidates preserve core economics/route context (score, liquidity, buy/sell ratio, age, route_exists/no_route, price impacts, probe size buckets, rejection reason) without adding API calls or changing trading behavior.
why_safe: Changes are limited to discovery observability payloads (seed prefilter, post-probe accepted/rejected, and probe-driven route rejections) and are metadata-only.
No new probes/API calls were added; this only persists data already present in seed/candidate/probe objects.
Field names are normalized and additive, preserving backward compatibility for existing scanners.
commit_message: Add shallow discovery capture for token analytics coverage
notes_for_cursor: Shallow normalized capture now emitted at seed-prefilter/overview-limit rejections, prefilter rejections, probe rejections, and accepted candidates. This should improve report recovery for liquidity/ratio/route/price-impact/rejection fields without changing strategy.
